name: English Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy 10-inch skillet.
2. Add the sugar, corn syrup, water, and 1 cup of almonds to the melted butter. Stir constantly until the mixture reaches a boil.
3. Continue cooking over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture reaches the soft crack stage (290°F on a candy thermometer).
4. Pour the cooled mixture into a greased 17 x 14-inch baking sheet (jelly roll pan).
5. Melt the chocolate chips and shortening together in hot water, stirring until smooth.
6. Spread the melted chocolate evenly over the toffee.
7. Sprinkle with the remaining 3/4 cup of toasted almonds.
8. Allow the chocolate to set completely.
9. Break apart the bars along the scored lines and store in a cool place in tins.
Makes 3 lbs of candy.
